Home › Volusia County › Lowest Health Scores

Restaurants With the Lowest Health Scores in Volusia County

BACI PIZZERIA & RISTORANTE sits at the bottom of the barrel in Volusia County: 37/100 at its most recent inspection, with 6 high-priority, 4 intermediate, and 3 basic violations on the report. It leads this list of 31 kitchens that graded D or F last time the state walked in.

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

  • F 37 B
    BACI PIZZERIA & RISTORANTE Italian ★ 4.5 (1425) New Smyrna Beach · Volusia County VegHealthy Violations: 6 high-priority, 4 intermediate, 3 basic Inspected Apr 2026

    BLUE SPRING PIZZA Italian ★ 4.2 (1438) Orange City · Volusia County VegGF Violations: 6 high-priority, 2 intermediate, 4 basic Inspected Mar 2026
